Package space.sunqian.fs.object.schema

package space.sunqian.fs.object.schema
This package provides definitions and utilities for schemas, including map schema and non-map object schema. The top interface for a data schema is DataSchema, and the two main sub-interfaces are MapSchema which represents the schema for map, and ObjectSchema which represents the schema for non-map object. Using codes similar to the following to parse: 

 // Parse a non-map object:
 ObjectSchema objectSchema = ObjectSchema.parse(type);
 // Get a property value:
 Object value = objectSchema.getProperty("someProperty").getValue(instant);

 // Parse a map:
 MapSchema mapSchema = MapSchema.parse(type);
 // Get the key type of the map:
 Type keyType = mapSchema.keyType();
The core interfaces of this package:
  • DataSchema
  • ObjectSchema
  • ObjectProperty
  • ObjectSchemaParser
  • MapSchema
  • MapSchemaParser
  • AbstractObjectSchemaHandler
  • CommonSchemaHandler
  • RecordSchemaHandler(only loaded on JDK 16+)
And utilities:
  • SchemaKit
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    space.sunqian.fs.object
    This package provides basic object related supports: ObjectKit: The utilities for objects; ObjectException: Base exception for object related errors; And its subpackages provide specific object related supports; space.sunqian.fs.object.schema: Defines schemas for data objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.builder: Defines steps for creating and building objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.convert: Converts and copies objects and properties; space.sunqian.fs.object.pool: Provides pool interfaces for objects; space.sunqian.fs.object.annotation: Provides annotations for object related operations;
    space.sunqian.fs.object.schema.handlers
     
    space.sunqian.fs.object.annotation
    This package provides annotations for object related operations, such as conversion and copying.
    space.sunqian.fs.object.builder
    This package provides builder related operations, it definitions and utilities for creating and building objects.
    space.sunqian.fs.object.convert
    This package provides core interfaces and utilities for object conversion and copying.
    space.sunqian.fs.object.pool
    This package provides simple way to create simple object pools:
  • Class
    Description
    DataSchema
    Top interface of MapSchema and ObjectSchema, presents the schema of a data object.
    DataSchemaException
    Exception for object schema, including map schema and non-map object schema.
    MapSchema
    This interface represents the schema of map, provides information about the map's entries.
    MapSchemaParser
    This interface is used to parse Type to MapSchema.
    MapType
    Represents the type of map.
    ObjectProperty
    This interface represents the property info of ObjectSchema.
    ObjectPropertyBase
    This interface provides the base info for ObjectProperty, typically used in the parsing process of ObjectSchema.
    ObjectSchema
    This interface represents the schema of non-map object, parsed by a ObjectSchemaParser, and provides information about the object's properties.
    ObjectSchemaParser
    This interface is used to parse Type to ObjectSchema.
    ObjectSchemaParser.Context
    Context for parsing the specified Type to ObjectSchema.
    ObjectSchemaParser.Handler
    Handler for ObjectSchemaParser, provides the specific parsing logic.
    SchemaKit
    Utilities for object schema, including map schema and non-map object schema.
